channel.title: Mexican on Gourmand Syndrome
channel.description: Recent content in Mexican on Gourmand Syndrome

item.title: La Cava Del Tequila
item.description: Summary This is located in the Mexican pavilion at Epcot. When you enter the pyramid, there’s a little store to the right next to the fountain. In this COVID environment, there are social distancing lines as you enter here. Unfortunately you can’t sit inside the bar, so you have to buy the drink and sit outside. I do not know if (or how much of) the drinks are pre-mixed, but it was served super fast.
